Este hotel de 4 estrelas dispõe de serviço de quartos e uma receção aberta 24 horas. Os hóspedes têm à sua disposição um bar.

Cada quarto inclui ar condicionado e uma televisão de ecrã plano, e alguns quartos do alojamento têm vista da cidade. Todos os quartos têm secretária.

São oferecidas opções de pequeno-almoço buffet, à carta e continental. Em Hilton Woking vai encontrar um restaurante que serve gastronomia inglesa, coreana e malaia. Além disso, há também a possibilidade de solicitar opções vegetariano, sem laticínios e halal.

Questo hotel a 4 stelle offre il servizo in camera e una reception 24 ore su 24. Gli ospiti possono usufruire di un bar.

Presso questo hotel, ogni camera comprende una scrivania. Presso Hilton Woking, tutte le camere comprendono aria condizionata e TV a schermo piatto, mentre alcune camere hanno la vista città. Tutte le camere hanno una cassaforte.

La colazione è disponibile e include opzioni a buffet, à la carte e continentali. Presso questa struttura troverete un ristorante che serve piatti britannici, piatti coreani e piatti malesi.

hotels.name: The Wellington
hotels.description_fr:
Doté d'une connexion Wi-Fi et d'un parking gratuits sur place, l'établissement The Wellington propose un restaurant populaire servant une cuisine primée, une grande terrasse et des chambres uniques avec des meubles anciens. Il se trouve à seulement 5 minutes de route de Welwyn Garden City.

Les chambres uniques de caractère présentent des éléments d'origine, notamment du parquet en pin et des cheminées à foyer ouvert. Chacune dispose également d'une télévision à écran plat, d'un plateau/bouilloire et d'une salle de bains privative avec articles de toilette gratuits.

De délicieux repas sont préparés à partir d'ingrédients frais locaux et vous pourrez déguster une gamme de plats traditionnels et plus créatifs.
hotels.description_en:
With free Wi-Fi and free parking on site, The Wellington offers a popular restaurant with award-winning food, a large terrace, and unique rooms with antique furniture. It is just 5 minutes’ drive from Welwyn Garden City.

Original features are prominent in the unique, characterful rooms, including pine floors and open fireplaces. Each also boasts a flat-screen TV, tea and coffee making facilities, and an en suite bathroom with free toiletries.

Delicious meals are made from fresh local ingredients, and guests can enjoy a range of traditional favourites and more creative dishes. Homemade puddings are also served, and there is a monthly changing specials board.

Central London is 27 miles from The Wellington, and Luton can be reached in 25 minutes by car.
hotels.description_es:
El The Wellington ofrece conexión Wi-Fi gratuita, aparcamiento gratuito, un restaurante popular con comida galardonada, una gran terraza y habitaciones únicas con muebles antiguos. Se encuentra a solo 5 minutos en coche de Welwyn Garden City.

Las características originales son destacadas en las habitaciones únicas y peculiares, con suelos de pino y chimeneas. TV de pantalla plana, set de té y café y baño con artículos de aseo gratuitos.

Las comidas se elaboran con ingredientes frescos de la zona y los huéspedes pueden disfrutar de una amplia variedad de platos tradicionales y platos más creativos. También se sirven postres caseros y menús especiales cada mes.

El centro de Londres está a 43 km de The Wellington y Luton se encuentra a 25 minutos en coche.
hotels.description_pt:

As características originais são proeminente nos quartos únicos e característicos, incluindo pisos em pinho e lareiras abertas. Cada um também inclui uma televisão de ecrã plano, comodidades para preparar chá/café e uma casa de banho privativa com produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos.

As deliciosas refeições são confeccionadas com ingredientes locais frescos e os hóspedes podem desfrutar de uma variedade de pratos tradicionais e de pratos mais criativos. Também são servidos pudins caseiros, e há uma prancha de especialidades do mensal.

Esclusive e caratteristiche, le camere presentano pavimenti in legno di pino e caminetti. TV a schermo piatto, set per la preparazione di tè e caffè e bagno interno con set di cortesia.

I deliziosi pasti sono preparati con ingredienti freschi locali e potrete gustare un assortimento di specialità tradizionali e piatti più creativi. Vengono serviti anche dolci fatti in casa e specialità mensili che variano ogni mese.

Il Wellington dista 43 km dal centro di Londra e 25 minuti di auto da Luton.

Il propose des équipements tels qu’une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et une télévision à écran plat. Cet hébergement est installé à 14 km de : Burghley House. Il propose un jardin et un parking privé gratuit.

L’hébergement possède une kitchenette équipée d’un réfrigérateur, d’un micro-ondes et d’un grille-pain. Il comprend également une douche, des articles de toilette gratuits et un sèche-cheveux.

L’établissement Glen House Annexe sert un petit-déjeuner buffet ou continental.

Vous séjournerez à respectivement 36 km et 40 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Fotheringhay Castle et Belton House.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Glen House Annexe in Bourne offers comfortable bed and breakfast rooms with garden views. Each room includes a private bathroom, kitchenette, and work desk.
Essential Facilities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, a garden, and free on-site private parking. The property provides daily housekeeping service and breakfast in the room, including continental and buffet options with fresh pastries and fruits.
Local Attractions: Burghley House is 14 km away, Peterborough Cathedral 29 km, and Belvoir Castle 43 km from the property. East Midlands Airport is 71 km distant.
Guest Satisfaction: Highly rated for room comfort, location with a view, and attentive host.
Couples particularly like the location — they rated it 9.8 for a two-person trip.

hotels.name: The White Hart
hotels.description_fr:
Dotée de jardins, de cheminées à foyer ouvert et de poutres en bois traditionnelles, cette belle auberge du XVe siècle propose une connexion Internet gratuite et un restaurant récompensé de 2 rosettes AA utilisant des ingrédients locaux de saison.
Le White Hart se trouve à la frontière Essex/Suffolk et à environ 10 milles de Braintree. Il a reçu 5 prix Gold -étoiles de Visit Britain (Gold Award) et l'AA.
Les chambres du White Hart sont situées dans un quartier calme et séparé. Chaque chambre dispose d'une télévision à écran plat et d'un plateau/bouilloire. Le White Hart possède également un salon exécutif. Vous trouverez également des bornes de recharge pour voitures électriques rapides dans le parking.
hotels.description_en:
With gardens, open fireplaces and traditional wooden beams, this beautiful 15th-century inn offers free internet and a 2 AA Rosette restaurant using local, seasonal ingredients.
The White Hart is on the Essex/Suffolk border and about 10 miles from Braintree. It has 5 Gold -star awards from Visit Britain (Gold Award) and the AA.
Rooms at The White Hart are in a quiet, separate block. Each room has a flat-screen TV and tea/coffee. The White Hart also has an executive guest lounge. There are also fast electric car charging points located in the car park.
In 2014 won the 'Best Small Hotel' at the Essex Tourism and Hospitality and in 2016 'Destination Dining Venue' at the Essex Fine Dining.

El White Hart está en la frontera Essex/Suffolk y a unas 10 millas de Braintree. Cuenta con 5 premios Gold -star de Visit Britain (Gold Award) y AA.

Dining Experience: Guests can enjoy British cuisine at the traditional restaurant, offering vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and dairy-free options. The bar provides a relaxing atmosphere for evening drinks.
Leisure Facilities: The hotel features a sun terrace, garden, and outdoor seating area. Additional amenities include daily housekeeping service, family rooms, and menus for special diets.
Local Attractions: Located 26 km from Hedingham Castle and 13 km from Flatford, the property is also close to Colchester Castle (17 km) and Freeport Braintree (33 km). London Stansted Airport is 66 km away.
